value.value: @concat('L1[', formatDateTime(adddays(utcnow(), pipeline().parameters.offset_days), 'yyyy'), ']-L2[', formatDateTime(adddays(utcnow(), mul(pipeline().parameters.offset_days, 2)), 'MM-dd'), ']-L3[', formatDateTime(adddays(utcnow(), mul(pipeline().parameters.offset_days, 3)), 'yyyyMMddHHmmss'), ']')

@concat(pipeline().parameters.env, '/', formatDateTime(adddays(utcnow(), pipeline().parameters.offset_days), 'yyyy'), '/', formatDateTime(adddays(utcnow(), pipeline().parameters.offset_days), 'MM'), '/', formatDateTime(adddays(utcnow(), pipeline().parameters.offset_days), 'dd'), '/report_', concat(formatDateTime(adddays(utcnow(), sub(0, pipeline().parameters.offset_days)), pipeline().parameters.date_format), '_', formatDateTime(adddays(utcnow(), pipeline().parameters.offset_days), concat('yyyyMMdd', 'HHmmss'))), '.json')

body.value: @json(concat('{"pipeline":"nested_formatdatetime_with_adddays","env":"', pipeline().parameters.env, '","computed_date":"', variables('computed_date'), '","nested_label":"', variables('nested_label'), '","final_output_path":"', variables('final_output'), '","level1_date":"', formatDateTime(adddays(utcnow(), pipeline().parameters.offset_days), pipeline().parameters.date_format), '","level2_date":"', formatDateTime(adddays(utcnow(), mul(pipeline().parameters.offset_days, 2)), concat('yyyy', '-MM-dd', 'THH:mm:ss')), '","level3_date":"', formatDateTime(adddays(utcnow(), mul(pipeline().parameters.offset_days, 3)), concat(pipeline().parameters.date_format, concat('T', 'HH:mm:ssZ'))), '"}'))
